sourceProvenance.excerpt: Context-dependent reconfiguration and spatial reorganisation of the miR-199a-5p/XIAP axis in high-grade serous ovarian cancer

Background: High-grade serous ovarian cancer (HGSOC) remains a leading cause of gynaecological cancer mortality, largely owing to late diagnosis and the emergence of platinum resistance. A defining feature of resistant disease is impaired apoptotic execution despite persistent survival signalling. XIAP is a key inhibitor of caspase activity, and microRNAs are important modulators of stress-response pathways; however, the functional relationship between individual miRNAs and their targets may var
